note: Animation-frame manifest for Krabby World (Stage 2 of the World One brief). Each state lists the poses to generate in Higgsfield. Generate every frame with the SAME locked style formula below, on a solid magenta #FF00FF background, full body, side view FACING LEFT, consistent character size across frames. The game chroma-keys frames at load time and falls back to the single sprite + procedural motion for any state whose frames are missing, so partial sets are safe to ship.
how_to_generate: 1. For each state frame below, build the prompt as: <subject>, <pose>, <style_formula>, 'isolated on a solid flat magenta #FF00FF background, nothing else in frame, full body visible, side view facing left, centered'.
3. Paste the returned CDN URL into that frame's slot in the 'urls' array here.
4. Mirror the finished 'urls' arrays into ART_FRAMES in game/index.html (pinny.states / grey.states) — the loader, chroma key, and renderer are already wired.
5. Check in the test room (game/index.html#test): walk, jump, claw, get hurt, and lure the crab onto a drop to see 'reclaim'.
style_formula: chunky 16-bit pixel art with painterly shading, classic SNES platformer feel, rounded bouncy shapes with thick dark-chocolate outlines, environments in lush layered jungle greens and sky blues, hero in warm pineapple-yellow with leafy green crown and red watermelon accents contrasting the surroundings, enemies in muted stony greys, pickups glowing watermelon-red and gold, hopeful sunny storybook atmosphere with soft depth haze, high contrast between game elements and backgrounds, clean readable silhouettes, consistent side-view perspective across all assets

pinny.subject: cute one-eyed pineapple-watermelon crab hero, round pineapple-yellow body with diamond texture, leafy green crown, one big friendly eye, two orange claws, red watermelon-slice accents, six small legs
pinny.reference: existing Pinny sprite (assets.json 'hero sprite (Pinny)') — keep the same character design in every frame

poses: standing relaxed on all legs, claws resting low, eye open and bright
standing relaxed, body lifted a touch as if breathing in, eye half closed in a slow blink
mid-scuttle with left legs forward and right legs back, claws swinging slightly
mid-scuttle with right legs forward and left legs back, body bobbed a little lower
leaping upward, body stretched tall, legs trailing below, claws raised for balance
falling, body tilted slightly forward, legs tucked up, claws open wide
winding up a claw strike, leading claw pulled back and open wide
claw snapped shut at full forward extension, motion feeling, body leaning into the strike
knocked back, eye squeezed shut, legs splayed, claws flinched inward

grey.subject: small grey crab minion with a sealed stony rounded shell, sleepy heavy-lidded eyes, two small grey claws, muted stony greys only
grey.reference: existing grey crab sprite (assets.json 'grey crab enemy sprite') — keep the same character design in every frame

poses: sitting heavy and still, shell settled low, eyes drooping
trudging sideways with left legs forward, shell rocked slightly back
trudging sideways with right legs forward, shell rocked slightly forward
scurrying urgently with both claws reaching out to grab something, eyes suddenly wide

future.note: Not required for the World One slice; add once the slice feels good.
future.pinny_celebrate: small joyful hop with claws up (level clear / restore milestone)
future.grey_cracked: shell cracked open with colour light spilling out
future.grey_cleanse: the crab, now faintly colourful, looking lighter and relieved
